pages.text: Energy has 7 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:energy_core_t1, kubejs:energy_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t1$() gates: mekanism:metallurgic_infuser, mekanism:basic_control_circuit, powah:energizing_rod_starter, powah:energy_cell_starter
$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t2$() gates: mekanism:steel_casing, mekanism:advanced_control_circuit, powah:energizing_rod_basic, powah:energy_cell_basic
$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t3$() gates: mekanism:elite_control_circuit, mekanism:energy_tablet, powah:energizing_rod_hardened
$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t4$() gates: mekanism:ultimate_control_circuit, mekanism:teleportation_core, powah:energizing_rod_blazing
$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t5$() gates: mekanism:teleporter, mekanism:qio_dashboard, mekanism:qio_drive_base, powah:energizing_rod_niotic

$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t6$() gates: mekanism:digital_miner, mekanism:ultimate_energy_cube, powah:energizing_rod_spirited
$(li)$(item)kubejs:energy_core_t7$() gates: mekanism:qio_drive_time_dilating
